---
id: update-2
title: "Update a bank account's mutable fields"
description: "Updates accountNumber, accountName, correspondentBank, swiftBic, and isPrimary. Returns 400 if legalEntityId, currency, or accountType differ from the stored values."
sidebar_label: "Update a bank account's mutable fields"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update a bank account's mutable fields"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/v1/bank-accounts/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates accountNumber, accountName, correspondentBank, swiftBic, and isPrimary. Returns 400 if legalEntityId, currency, or accountType differ from the stored values.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
